docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,300.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA DBA. (G & O TAX SERVICE) AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $130.00 SERVED NOV-06-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEFFREY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA DBA. (G & O TAX SERVICE) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, JEFFREY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
